_comment: Hand-curated image URLs for JPP-U* Unnumbered Promo cards that couldn't
be filled automatically from Bulbapedia / TCGPlayer.
The script downloads each URL, saves it locally under
frontend/public/jp-unn/{card_id}.jpg, and updates the DB row's
Idempotent: re-running skips card_ids that already have image_small set.
To force overwrite, delete frontend/public/jp-unn/{card_id}.jpg first.
Where to find URLs (order of preference):
2) PSA CardFacts (psacard.com/cardfacts) — cert images are public
3) eBay sold listings — right-click 'View image' on active-looking scans
4) Yahoo Auctions Japan (auctions.yahoo.co.jp) for pure JP-only cards
5) Reddit r/PokemonTCG threads on vintage JP promos
AVOID: collectr's public.getcollectr.com CDN (ToS §5.2 blocks scraping)
Below is a suggested priority list — the highest-value / most-searched
missing cards. Fill in URLs when you find them; leave blank ones alone.
_priority_hint_ancient_mew_error: JPP-U1996-113 already has base Ancient Mew art (from TCGPlayer). If you want the 'Nintedo Error Print' variant specifically, replace with that URL.
_note_after_priority: Add any card_id you have a URL for — script picks up all non-empty entries.
